case_title: JAMES LESTER VS. HUGO VILLAVICENCIO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-01-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE DISMISSAL FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF BANKRUPTCY. THE AUG-21-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED AS TO BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-01-2013 AT 10:30 AM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
